irisDashboard.title: Iris Dashboard
irisDashboard.error: Failed to load dashboard data. Please try again.

help.totalSessions: Total number of Iris chat sessions created during the selected time range (includes course/exercise chats and tutor-suggestion sessions).
help.activeSessions: Sessions created in the selected time range that received at least one user message.
help.engagementRate: Share of total sessions that were active (received at least one user message): active ÷ total × 100.
help.uniqueUsers: Number of distinct users who sent at least one message during the selected time range.
help.noResponseRate: Share of eligible user messages that received no Iris response. Only messages old enough to have plausibly been answered (older than the stale-response threshold) are counted.
help.noResponseMessages: Number of eligible user messages that received no Iris response.
help.noResponseSessions: Number of distinct sessions containing at least one unanswered user message.
help.thumbsUpRatio: Share of Iris (LLM) messages rated thumbs-up, out of all Iris messages. 'Absolute' is the share of all sessions that received at least one thumbs-up.
help.thumbsDownRatio: Share of Iris (LLM) messages rated thumbs-down, out of all Iris messages. 'Absolute' is the share of all sessions that received at least one thumbs-down.
help.sessionsWithThumbsUp: Number of distinct sessions with at least one thumbs-up rating.
help.sessionsWithThumbsDown: Number of distinct sessions with at least one thumbs-down rating.
help.avgResponseTime: Average time between a user message and the following Iris response, in seconds.
help.p50p95: Median (P50) and 95th-percentile (P95) response time between a user message and the following Iris response, in seconds.
help.tokenCost: Estimated LLM token cost attributed to Iris during the selected time range, in euros (sum of input and output token costs).
